ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Residual maturity of the contract - RSDL_MTRTY_CNTRCT
ChangeRequest.comment:
## Overview Template F 33.00.b requires information on the residual maturity of the contract, which is something not yet included in the BIRD LDM. ## Contact person @Arianna.Nuvoli @Maria_Manuel.Henriques @Pietro.Ferroni ## Legal definition According to Annex XVII, section _3. Part B: Maturity data_
F 33.00.b, row 0020 is described as follows:
> **Collateral received re-used (receiving leg)**

See instructions for row 0130 of the AE-COL template and column 0040 of the AE-SOU template.

The amounts are reported at fair value and distributed among the set of **residual maturity buckets** specified in the columns according to the **residual maturity** of the transaction that generated for the entity the reception of the collateral that is being re-used (receiving leg). ## Reason for inclusion AE integration ## Relationships This issue is linked to the modelling of a collateral received re-used. #477 ## Relevant Framework/Template - F 33.00.b - Asset encumbrance: Maturity data (b) ### Before closing checklist * [ ] Assign reviewer (orignal author of the issue) * [ ] Assignee to close (should not be same as original author) * [ ] If the issue resolution does not require a logical data model, technical, or code change, a continuous improvement action should have been taken (e.g. improve documentation)
